text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fans vote to decide who is invited to run in
the Arima Kinen. Satono Diamond was voted in
second, right behind Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The audience erupts as they make their entrance,
but Satono Diamond is just as excited as they are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond's goal is to become an illustrious
runner, and she's ecstatic to race against Kitasan
Black as part of achieving that goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been chasing after Kitasan Black for so
long, and now she finally has the chance to
surpass her at the Arima Kinen!
